parameters.formDescription: For Product Managers - An AI-powered weekly digest that automatically researches, summarizes, and delivers weekly market and competitor digests across multiple industries - via email and slack every Monday at 7 AM.

nodes.name: Append or update row in sheet

parameters.subject: You've been unsubscribed from Weekly Digest
parameters.message: Hi,  You've been successfully unsubscribed from the Market Digest weekly newsletter.  You will no longer receive weekly digests. If you'd like to resubscribe in the future, simply fill out the form again.  The Market Digest Team

parameters.content: ## INPUTS - Subscribers and per‑industry config live in a Google Sheet. A weekly trigger kicks the workflow off Monday at 7 AM.
## SEARCH: For each industry, pulls ten recent articles from that industry's watchlist of trusted domains and regulators.

## SYNTHESIS 

Build prompt (Code node) — prompt is dynamic.Build prompt (Code node) — prompt is dynamic. It changes every run based on topic, watchlist, companies, regulations, search results, and date. A Code node lets you use JavaScript template literals and conditionals to build it. The Anthropic node's text field isn't designed for that complexity.

Trusted domains in Tavily — include_domains comes from the watchlist which is looked up per industry at runtime. You can't hardcode it because it's different for FinTech vs FemTech vs a custom industry.
Short version: anything dynamic belongs in a Code node. The API nodes are just the delivery mechanism.
## DELIVER - Full HTML digest to inbox. Top story plus a nudge in Slack. Unsubscribe just flips a flag in the Sheet.
